title: Vineyard Emitter Placement: Yield-Weighted Cap Set in F_3^n
strategies: structural baseline: switch on every plot whose ternary address uses only terraces 0 and 1 (the {0,1}^n sub-cube) -- always a valid cap set, ignores yields, reproduces the checker baseline (ratio ~0.1)
yield-priority greedy: consider plots in decreasing water yield and add each emitter that does not complete a forbidden 3-in-a-line with two already-on emitters (the FunSearch priority scaffold)
greedy + local search: refine the greedy cap set by swapping in heavy off-emitters, evicting the cheaper emitters that block them whenever the trade strictly raises total yield
structured constructions: build large caps from products of small extremal caps, or randomized multi-restart yield-greedy keeping the best over seeds
